arts.ttl: Real Madrid to come up against Messi once again in December
arts.sum: LALIGA FC Futures, a youth tournament for youngsters aged seven to 12, has announced its 2024 schedule with an exciting surprise: Thiago Messi, Lionel’s eldest son, and his Inter Miami team will be in Group A alongside Real Madrid, Betis, and Dortmund. If everything goes as expected, the Inter Miami vs Real Madrid match in the youth tournament will take place on Friday, December 27, right after the Christmas holidays and just before the New Year.
